EX59 Error Messages PAGEREF _Toc2133673901 \h 13 4.1 Custom Error Messages PAGEREF _Toc680419195 \h 13 1. GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX59 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C -E59-EX59 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - E59 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in E59 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX59 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. C-E59-EX59 Max Retunrable Units Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Click Add in lower right-hand corner of screen. Configure as seen in the image above if not already configured. CLICK SAVE. Open Code Ids for E59 and configure Code ID as seen in image above. MCLN division needs are used to determine value ranging from 1-99999. CLICK SAVE. 3. ADD TRANSACTION PARAMETERS EX59 ENABLEMENT 3.1 RF Receiving Transaction Navigate to the Transaction Parameters Search Recv* Transactions Select the transaction Select Receiving transaction, then select program template Select ‘Add’ and configure as seen below Select Save Edit the “Parameter Value” box for EX 59 to checked for EX59 functionality. This step needs to be repeated for all Receiving transactions that will use this functionality. 4 . EX59 Error Messages 4 .1 Custom Error Messages Navigate to the Messages UI then Message Master Tab Select + and the upper right-hand side of screen. Add values below if not already added. Save.

MCLN division needs are used to determine value ranging from 1-99999. CLICK SAVE. 3.
